headline: Oppenheimer Maintains Outperform on Dollar General, Lowers Price Target to $150
summary: Oppenheimer  analyst Rupesh Parikh   maintains Dollar General (NYSE:DG) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $170 to $150.

headline: Dollar General (DG) Shares Skyrocket, What You Need To Know
summary: Shares of discount retailer Dollar General (NYSE:DG) jumped 6% in the afternoon session after its rival, Dollar Tree, reported strong first-quarter results and raised its full-year profit outlook, sparking a rally in the discount retail sector.
